passive.name: Vow of the First Lands
passive.description: Yunara's Critical Strikes deal bonus magic damage.

Q.name: Cultivation of Spirit
Q.description: Yunara gains Attack Speed, bonus damage On-Hit, and her Attacks spread to nearby enemies.

W.name: Arc of Judgment | Arc of Ruin
W.description: Yunara fires a spinning prayer bead that deals damage and slows enemies. While in her Transcendent State she instead fires off a laser that deals damage and slows enemies.
W.tooltip:
Yunara lets rip a prayer bead that deals {{ calc_damage_initial }} magic damage and Slows by {{ calc_slow }} decaying over {{ slow_duration }} seconds. It deals an additional {{ calc_damage_per_second }} magic damage per second.

Transcendent State - Arc of Ruin: Yunara fires a laser that deals {{ spell.yunarar:calc_rw_damage }} magic damage and Slows by {{ spell.yunarar:calc_rw_slow_amount }} decaying over {{ spell.yunarar:rw_slow_duration }} second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

E.name: Kanmei's Steps | Untouchable Shadow
E.description: Yunara gains Move Speed and becomes Ghosted. While in her Transcendent State she instead dashes in a direction.
E.tooltip:
Yunara gains {{ calc_move_speed }} Move Speed, increased to {{ calc_move_speed_enhanced }} Move Speed when moving toward an enemy champion, for {{ buff_duration }} seconds.

Transcendent State - Untouchable Shadow: Yunara dashes in a direction.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

R.name: Transcend One's Self
R.description: Yunara enters a Transcendent State that upgrades her basic Abilities.
R.tooltip: Yunara enters a Transcendent State for {{ buff_duration }} seconds upgrading her basic Abilities for the duration.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}
